title: Embeddings Generation & Caching Flow
interaction_flow: AiManager → AiManager: embeddingsAreFaked()? → clone provider + useEmbeddingGateway(fakeGateway) : provider
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration → Provider: defaultEmbeddingsModel() [if model is null]
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration → Provider: defaultEmbeddingsDimensions() [if dimensions is null]
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration → PendingEmbeddingsGeneration: shouldCache() [cacheSeconds set OR config('ai.caching.embeddings.cache')]
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration → EmbeddingsResponse: new EmbeddingsResponse(embeddings, 0, Meta) [from cache]
alt CACHE MISS: PendingEmbeddingsGeneration → EmbeddingProvider: embeddings(inputs, dimensions, model, timeout)
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration → PendingEmbeddingsGeneration: cacheEmbeddings(provider, model, dimensions, response)
alt FAILOVER: on FailoverableException → event(ProviderFailedOver) → continue to next provider in list
key_relationships: AiManager extends MultipleInstanceManager, resolves named provider instances
EmbeddingProvider is interface with: embeddings(), embeddingGateway(), useEmbeddingGateway(), defaultEmbeddingsModel(), defaultEmbeddingsDimensions()
EmbeddingsResponse implements Arrayable, Countable, IteratorAggregate, JsonSerializable
EmbeddingsResponse fields: array embeddings (array<float>[]), int tokens, Meta meta

method_signatures.PendingEmbeddingsGeneration::cacheEmbedd: protected cacheEmbeddings(Provider $provider, string $model, int $dimensions, EmbeddingsResponse $response): void

important_notes: Failover: providers list supports multiple fallback providers; FailoverableException triggers next provider + ProviderFailedOver event
Caching is opt-in via ->cache() call OR enabled globally via config('ai.caching.embeddings.cache', false)
Cache store is configurable via config('ai.caching.embeddings.store')
Provider resolution uses MultipleInstanceManager; driver name comes from config('ai.providers.<name>.driver')
queue() path dispatches GenerateEmbeddings job instead of immediate generation
Fake mode: AiManager clones provider and injects FakeEmbeddingGateway; queue() records a QueuedEmbeddingsPrompt
